---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or workflow improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or friction you're hitting.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

**Does this keep the harness standalone and tool-agnostic?**
This project deliberately avoids bundling a framework with its own parallel config (see "Why standalone" in the README). Briefly explain how your idea fits within that constraint.

**Additional context**
Anything else that helps — examples, links, or mockups.
